name: Gansu Yasheng Industrial (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Gansu Yasheng Industrial (Group) Co., Ltd. engages in research and development, processing and sales of agricultural products in China. The company primarily produces and sells hops, potatoes, pastures, fruits, sunflowers, peppers, alfalfa, spices, beets, red dates, stevia, medicinal materials, and other water-saving irrigation materials. It engages in hop planting and management activities, as well as offers drip irrigation products, such as pipe, belt, PVC and PE pipe, etc. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Lanzhou, China.
